allies.rationale_text: Decomposition strengthens consulting-firms-methodology by turning vague issues into hypothesis-testable parts.
allies.source_quote: breaking it down into manageable parts

allies.rationale_text: Root-cause-analysis strengthens consulting-firms-methodology by keeping diagnosis at the machine level instead of stopping at symptoms.
allies.source_quote: thinking of an organization or system as a machine

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts consulting-firms-methodology when the initial hypothesis becomes politically protected instead of rigorously tested.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Consulting-firms-methodology conflicts with empathy when framework-complete recommendations miss stakeholder adoption frictions.
structured_tensions.source_quote: consulting-firms-methodology vs empathy: framework-complete recommendations miss stakeholder adoption frictions.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Consulting-firms-methodology conflicts with optimization-theory when slide-level objective tuning weakens execution coherence across teams.
structured_tensions.source_quote: consulting-firms-methodology vs optimization-theory: slide-level objective tuning weakens execution coherence across teams.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Consulting-firms-methodology conflicts with confirmation-bias when the initial hypothesis is politically sensitive and the team seeks only confirming data.
structured_tensions.source_quote: consulting-firms-methodology vs confirmation-bias: the initial hypothesis is politically sensitive and the team unconsciously seeks only data that confirms it.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
